pages.title: 2048 Cuteness Edition
pages.description:
Slide numbered tiles across the grid to combine matching values and create higher scores using strategic merges. The gameplay centers on tile movement and position management within a confined space, testing players’ spatial planning under growing board complexity. Players aim to reach the highest possible tile by balancing careful merges and limited empty cells.

Key Features

• Sliding tile combination mechanic  
• Directional swipe controls  
• Increasing board congestion challenge  
• Score-based progression system  
• Minimalist numeric tile design
